---
title: "Multidisciplinary Optimization of Solid Rocket Motors"
subtitle: "Theory, Methods, and Python Implementations"
author: "Troy Altus"
date: "March 2026"
---

# Welcome

This book provides a rigorous, hands-on guide to **multidisciplinary design optimization (MDO)** of solid rocket motors.

It combines theory, disciplinary models (ballistics, structures, thermal, trajectory), and ready-to-run Python code.

Start with **Chapter 1** or jump to any section using the sidebar.

Happy optimizing! 🚀
